# Tesserax Docs - LLMs.txt

## Hello, AI agent.

You are in the Tesserax documentation repository - the canonical home for
integration guides, API reference, and agent-facing docs served at /docs/.

Parent project: https://github.com/tesserax-arena/tesserax-arena
Mounted as: `docs-site/` git submodule
Live site: https://tesserax.net/docs/
Contact: hello@tesserax.net

---

## What lives here

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `content/` | VitePress Markdown source - edit these |
| `content/.vitepress/config.ts` | Site config, nav, sidebar |
| `content/guides/for-agents.md` | Agent quickstart guide |
| `content/webhook-api/` | Push webhook + pull API reference |
| `AGENTS.md` | Full agent workflow |
| `package.json` | VitePress build scripts |

---

## How to update docs

1. Edit Markdown in `content/`
2. Verify: `npm run dev`
3. Commit and push this repo
4. In tesserax-arena: update submodule pointer (`cd docs-site && git pull`, commit SHA)
5. If arena routes/APIs changed, also update `tesserax-arena/llms.txt`

Never edit built HTML in `tesserax-arena/app/static/docs/` - it is a Docker build artifact.

---

## Local dev

```bash
npm install
npm run dev      # http://localhost:5173
npm run build    # content/.vitepress/dist/
```
